The '''Dofine family''' was an important family from [[Neimoidia/Legends|Neimoidia]]. [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] captains [[Daultay Dofine/Legends|Daultay]] and [[Lushros Dofine/Legends|Lushros Dofine]] were both well-known members of this family. Daultay was the commanding officer of the last [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]] stationed in orbit after the rest of the blockade had left during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Daultay was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] destroyed the control ship under his command. Lushros was the captain of the [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] flagship of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Lushros was killed when his escape pod was hit by a stray laser blast. Daultay was considered about Sidious methods in the phantom menace he was then called a slime
